prompt: Toggle Bluetooth (turn it off if on, or on if off). Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings toggle_bluetooth OFF'` (or `ON`), or `blueutil --power 0` / `blueutil --power 1`. Otherwise use Control Center > Bluetooth, or System Settings > Bluetooth. The eval reads /Library/Preferences/com.apple.Bluetooth ControllerPowerState (or the running blued state) and expects it differs from setup time.
